title: FIGURE 1 in Characterization and expression of the gene glucose transporter 2 (GLUT2) in embryonic, larval and adult Bay snook Petenia splendida (Cichliformes: Cichlidae)
author: Castillo-Collado, Alejandra del Carmen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: FIGURE 1 | Partial sequence of nucleotides and amino acids (AA) encoding glut2 (glucose transporter 2) from Petenia splendida taken from Gen Bank to design specific oligonucleotides for qPCR.
